name: flow-07-connection-graph-writer
description: T75 ConnectionGraphWriter — ORCHESTRATION archetype. ORM transaction writes both A→B and B→A edges atomically → storeDocument → SocialConnectionEstablished emit.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: social_graph_bidirectional_atomic, connection_id_direction_independent, store_before_enqueue
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch patterns for T75: bidirectional atomic write, direction-independent connectionId
Break T75 into: compute direction-independent connectionId → ORM transaction (A→B + B→A upsert) → storeDocument → SocialConnectionEstablished emit

Generate connection-graph.service.ts: connectionId = hash(sorted([userIdA, userIdB]) + tenantId), orm.transaction writes both edges atomically, storeDocument('xiigen-connection-graph') BEFORE enqueue('SocialConnectionEstablished')
Named check validation: social_graph_bidirectional_atomic, connection_id_direction_independent, store_before_enqueue
Score generated code 0-100 against T75 iron rules: bidirectional atomic transaction, direction-independent ID, DNA-8 ordering
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=single ORM transaction (both A→B and B→A), rejected=two separate storeDocument calls (partial-write window). curriculumTier=1.
